title: Research Atlas read-only public preview v0
problem: Evidence DB atlas population and coherence are closed on operator paths (294-298) but no product-facing surface lets a human evaluate whether the Atlas contract feels usable before deeper backend dependencies harden.
acceptance_criteria: Pre-ticket audit written before implementation (public-site + public-facing data presentation).
Read-only public-site preview page (e.g. /atlas-preview) using committed fixture or mock-safe Atlas snapshot data only.

Text-first sections: research run summary, domain/candidate domain, claims/cards, nodes/edges summary, reports, follow-up questions, lineage/research trail, coherence status badge or summary when available.
No operator-private live Atlas exports, public write routes, ingestion routes, or live LLM calls.
No export-public semantic changes unless pre-ticket audit explicitly approves.
No complex graph visualization or image/media assets.
Public site builds successfully; safety audit passes; golden + full pytest pass.
Final report includes screenshots or clear text description of page sections and honest product verdict.
non_goals: Live/public Atlas consumption from operator DB.
export-public semantic changes without audit approval.
rollback_plan: Revert public-site page and fixture wiring; remove route only.
